ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crime_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "complaint_number" TEXT /* Complaint number assigned to the incident */,
  "coded_month" TEXT /* Coded month of the incident */,
  "date_occurred" TEXT /* Date and time when the incident occurred */,
  "flag_crime" TEXT /* Flag indicating if the incident is a crime */,
  "flag_unfounded" TEXT /* Flag indicating if the incident was unfounded */,
  "flag_administrative" TEXT /* Flag indicating if the incident is administrative */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of incidents */,
  "flag_cleanup" TEXT /* Flag indicating if the incident requires cleanup */,
  "crime_code" INTEGER /* Crime code for the incident */,
  "district" INTEGER /* District where the incident occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "ileads_address" INTEGER /* ILEADS address identifier */,
  "ileads_street" TEXT /* ILEADS street name */,
  "neighborhood" INTEGER /* Neighborhood where the incident occurred */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location where the incident occurred */,
  "location_comment" TEXT /* Additional comments about the location */,
  "cad_address" TEXT /* CAD address identifier */,
  "cad_street" TEXT /* CAD street name */,
  "x_coord" REAL /* X coordinate of the incident location */,
  "y_coord" REAL /* Y coordinate of the incident location */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., violent, property) */,
  "weapon_involved" TEXT /* Flag indicating if a weapon was involved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the incident (e.g., open, closed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incidents_crime_code FOREIGN KEY ("crime_code") REFERENCES crime_codes ("crime_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incidents_district FOREIGN KEY ("district") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incidents_neighborhood FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_codes" (
  "crime_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime code */,
  "crime_description" TEXT /* Description of the crime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "district_commander" TEXT /* Name of the district commander */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_description" TEXT /* Description of the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the update was made */,
  "update_comment" TEXT /* Comment describing the update */,
  "update_author" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_updates_update_author FOREIGN KEY ("update_author") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_updates_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES crime_incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., officer, detective, admin) */,
  "badge_number" TEXT /* Badge number of the user (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the incident */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the incident was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_access_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES crime_incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gis_data" (
  "gis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GIS data entry */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident associated with the GIS data */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the incident location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the incident location */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the geographical data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gis_data_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES crime_incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigations" (
  "investigation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investigation */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being investigated */,
  "investigation_status" TEXT /* Status of the investigation (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "lead_officer" INTEGER /* ID of the lead officer */,
  "investigation_description" TEXT /* Description of the investigation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investigations_lead_officer FOREIGN KEY ("lead_officer") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investigations_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES crime_incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officer_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer */,
  "incident_solved" INTEGER /* Number of incidents solved by the officer */,
  "incident_closed" INTEGER /* Number of incidents closed by the officer */,
  "average_response_time" REAL /* Average response time of the officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_officer_performance_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_files" (
  "case_file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case file */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident associated with the case file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the case file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the case file (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "file_contents" TEXT /* Contents of the case file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_files_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES crime_incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_hotspots" (
  "hotspot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hotspot */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the hotspot location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the hotspot location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the hotspot location */,
  "crime_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of crimes in the hotspot area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hotspot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "crime_type" TEXT /* Type of crime (e.g., violent, property) */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the crime trend */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)
